CVE-2018-20786.title: libvterm through 0+bzr726, as used in Vim and other products, mis ...
CVE-2018-20786.description: libvterm through 0+bzr726, as used in Vim and other products, mishandles certain out-of-memory conditions, leading to a denial of service (application crash), related to screen.c, state.c, and vterm.c.
